description_long: This jewelry set consists of a necklace and a pair of earrings displayed on a white bust stand. The necklace features a series of smooth, elongated, mint-green beads arranged symmetrically along a thin, metallic chain, with the central beads forming a gentle arc. The earrings are dangle-style, each with a matching mint-green bead and a smaller, round, lavender bead above it, suspended from simple hooks. The beads have a polished, semi-glossy finish, giving them a refined and elegant appearance. The bust stand is matte white, with a gently curved surface and a sturdy base, designed to showcase the jewelry prominently. The overall design motif is clean and modern, with a subtle touch of color that draws attention to the jewelry's form and arrangement. The set is suitable for display in boutiques, urban markets, or as a personal accessory in everyday urban environments.
description: A necklace and matching earrings set with mint-green and lavender beads, displayed on a white bust stand. The jewelry features a modern, polished look with smooth, elongated beads and a metallic chain.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the bust stand and the necklace's chain draping smoothly, with beads partially visible.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying the full arrangement of the necklace and both earrings, highlighting the bead colors and symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the chain and beads from the other profile, with the earring hooks slightly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view of the bust stand, with the necklace chain visible at the top and no jewelry details on display.
